text: i told the uber driver to take a different route and he actually did lmao now im stuck in traffic
been playing candy crush on the toilet for 45 mins my legs are numb
sent 3 texts in a row again. she hasnt opened the first one yet
whoever farted in the elevator at 9:03am on floor 6 i will find you
my fake plants look better than your real ones and i dont have to talk to them
found a vintage lamp at a garage sale for $2. its haunted but the vibe is immaculate
got a tattoo of a pizza slice at 2am in cancun. no ragrets. ok maybe one ragret
did bohemian rhapsody at karaoke last night. three people left during the opera part
i use hand sanitizer after shaking hands with my own reflection just to be safe
i carry 4 different hand sanitizers. one for each mood
im on level 4892 of candy crush somebody please intervene
told the taxi driver he missed the turn. he said i missed the point of letting him drive
double texted my crush then liked my own message by accident
cropdusted the entire elevator ride from floor 12 to lobby. personal best
my fake succulent just got complimented by a botanist. peak performance
bought a box of vhs tapes at a yard sale. dont even own a vcr but they spoke to me
my impulse tattoo says 'no regerts' and honestly thats the most honest thing on my body
sang wonderwall at karaoke and the dj unplugged the mic during the second verse
sanitized my phone then touched my face then sanitized my phone again. the cycle continues
jello shots at 11am on a tuesday is called brunch if you believe hard enough
i backseat drive from the backseat of the bus. the driver hates me
my screen time report said 6 hrs of candy crush. thats called dedication not addiction
texted 'hey' then 'heyy' then 'sorry wrong person' in under 40 seconds
someone brought a dog into the elevator and it looked at me like it knew what i did
watered my fake plant in front of guests to keep up appearances
garage sale find of the year: a bread maker from 1994 that still slaps
got matching impulse tattoos with a stranger in vegas. we are now bonded for life apparently
tried to hit the high note in total eclipse of the heart. shattered a glass. literally
i sanitize the hand sanitizer bottle before using it. you cant be too careful
jello shots dont count as drinking if theyre fruit flavored thats just science
my uber driver asked me to stop giving directions. its a compulsion ok
lost all my candy crush lives and stared at the ceiling for 20 mins waiting for them back
the triple text is an art form and i am picasso
got blamed for someone elses elevator fart today. the injustice
bought a fake fiddle leaf fig for $80 and it has more personality than my roommate
found a working furby at a garage sale. it wont stop talking. what have i done
woke up with a tattoo of a duck wearing sunglasses. honestly its growing on me
karaoke host said i was banned. from a bar i dont even remember going to
offered a stranger hand sanitizer and they looked at me like i was insane. rude
made jello shots for thanksgiving. grandma had seven. legend
if you signal before changing lanes youre basically asking for my opinion
candy crush sent me a notification saying 'we miss you' after 2 hours. clingy
accidentally sent a double text to my boss. it just said 'plz respond'. cool cool cool
there should be a separate elevator for people who had chipotle for lunch
told someone my fake orchid needs 'indirect sunlight' and they believed me
spent $3 at a garage sale and left with a full set of encyclopedias from 1987
the tattoo artist asked 'are you sure' three times. i should have listened
did a duet at karaoke by myself. both parts. the crowd was confused but respectful
my purse is 40% hand sanitizer bottles by weight
jello shot veteran here. if it jiggles i can do a shot of it. no questions asked
i once navigated my friend into a one way street going the wrong way. we survived tho
deleted candy crush to be productive. reinstalled it 11 minutes later
she said 'lol' and i sent back 4 paragraphs. we are not the same
held it together for 11 floors then the doors opened and i was free
my fake plants have survived longer than any of my relationships
negotiated a garage sale lamp from $5 to $3. the rush was better than any raise ive gotten
got a chinese character tattoo on impulse. it means soup apparently
the karaoke machine at dennys feared me and it was right to
someone coughed near me so i bathed in purell in the parking lot
brought jello shots to a potluck. they said bring a side dish. jello is a side dish
i have strong opinions about merging lanes and i will share them unsolicited
played candy crush during a meeting and accidentally screen shared it. promoted tho
the read receipt is on and she hasnt opened it. its been 3 days. im fine
silent but deadly is my elevator motto
dusted my fake plants today to maintain the illusion of effort
garage sales are just treasure hunts for adults with $10 budgets
the tattoo parlor had a flash sale. thats how i got a dolphin on my ankle
sang baby one more time so bad the bartender gave me a free drink out of pity
i keep emergency hand sanitizer in my car, desk, bag, pocket, and shoe. shoe one is new
jello shots are the only reason i go to parties lets be honest
my coworker microwaves fish and then takes the elevator. absolute menace
i judge people by their shopping cart organization and i am not sorry
been wearing the same hoodie for 4 days. its not dirty its seasoned
accidentally liked a photo from 2019 while stalking. might fake my own death
my password is password123 and i sleep fine at night
put googly eyes on everything in the office fridge. no one has said anything yet
i take the stairs to avoid elevator small talk not for fitness
left a fake 5 star yelp review for my own cooking. i deserve it
snuck snacks into the movies in my cargo pants. 8 pockets all full. living my best life
reply all is a weapon and i have used it recklessly
my check engine light has been on since 2023. we coexist now
i clap when the plane lands and i will never stop
put 'proficient in excel' on my resume. i can make the cells different colors
been pretending to understand crypto for 3 years. still dont know what a blockchain is
my smoke detector has been beeping for 2 weeks. we vibin tho
i wave back at people who werent waving at me. every single time
still thinking about the insult someone said to me in 2014. just thought of a comeback
i use incognito mode to google things i should already know. like how to boil water
brought my own toilet paper to work because i have standards
the office thermostat is my nemesis and i will win this war
told everyone i wake up at 5am. i wake up at 5am to scroll tiktok in bed
my autocorrect changed 'on my way' to 'on my way' so many times it gave up on me
i pretend my airpods are in so nobody talks to me. they ran out of battery 2 hours ago
bought a label maker and now everything in my apartment has a label. including the label maker
my uber rating is 4.2 and i genuinely dont know what i did
i rehearse phone calls in my head for 20 mins then text instead
someone said 'see you later' and i said 'love you'. it was the mailman
ate cereal for dinner 5 nights in a row. its called meal consistency
the group chat has 47 unread messages and i am afraid to open it
just realized ive been pronouncing quinoa wrong for like 6 years
my junk drawer has a junk drawer and im not ready to deal with that
